feed.title: K M Manohar Insights
feed.subtitle:
The Future Is Already Here
We Decode What Truly Matters

author.name: K M Manohar | Independent Science and Technology Analyst

entry.title: Soft Neuromorphic Electronics: The Future of AI Skin and Brain-Like Computing
entry.summary: What if your smartwatch could think like a brain and stretch like your skin? Scientists are building electronics that don't just process information—they learn, heal, bend, and move with your body.     Table of ContentsSummary1. The Turning Point<!--[if !supportLists]-->2. entry.title: Biohybrid Microrobots Repair Spinal Cord Injuries-How Stem Cells and Nanotechnology Could Transform Regenerative Medicine
entry.summary: A spinal cord injury has long been considered one of medicine's most devastating and irreversible conditions.Now scientists have created microscopic living robots that can carry stem cells directly to damaged nerves, stimulate them wirelessly, and help restore movement.If this technology succeeds in humans, it could change the future of paralysis treatment forever.Scientists have created

link.title: Biohybrid Microrobots Repair Spinal Cord Injuries-How Stem Cells and Nanotechnology Could Transform Regenerative Medicine

entry.title: What Is Hantavirus? The Deadly Rodent-Borne Disease Raising Global Alarm After Cruise Ship Outbreak
entry.summary:
A virus carried by ordinary rodents has suddenly stranded a cruise ship and triggered worldwide concern.Unlike influenza or COVID-19, hantavirus hides silently in dust, cabins, storage spaces, and even clean-looking homes.<!--🔝 TOP BOX : 3 LIFE SIGNALS YOU SHOULDN’T IGNORE-->
💭 3 Life Signals You Shouldn’t Ignore
1️⃣ Health: Your sleep may be broken long before your body feels
